episodes.title: The Finders Part 2
episodes.description:
Grab a beer and join us tonight as we wrap up our series on The Finders! In part two, we'll get into the group's founder - Marion Pettie. We'll cover what we know of his background, and how the cult operated. Then we'll go over all the CIA involvement, and try to figure out what The Finders were/are.

episodes.title: The Finders Part 1
episodes.description:
Grab a beer and join us tonight as we go down the rabbit hole, and start our series on The Finders! We'll start with the bizarre 1987 arrest two men in Tallahassee, FL, and follow that thread to a warehouse filed with sensitive documents, photos, etc.

episodes.title: Order of the Solar Temple Part 1
episodes.description: Grab a beer and join us tonight as we get back into the world of cults! In part one of our series on the Order of the Solar Temple we will look at the cult's leaders Joe Di Mambro and Luc Jouret. We will examine the foundation of their beliefs, and how a group that experts debate on whether or not they are a cult - ends in murder and mass suicide. https://www.necronomipod.com https://www.patreon.com/necronomipod Want to advertise/sponsor our show? episodes.title: Children of God Part 1
episodes.description: Grab a beer and join us tonight as we discuss the Children of God cult! We get into the early life of David Berg, and the beginnings of the cult. We'll take an extensive look at how David introduced sex, incest, and pedophilia to the cult - with his infamous Mo Letters. https://www.necronomipod.com https://www.patreon.com/necronomipod Learn more about your ad choices.
